title: Proofpack smoke test (skips if no card worktree exists)
command: bash -c 'set -euo pipefail; d="tower/worktrees"; if [ ! -d "$d" ]; then echo "SKIP: no tower/worktrees"; exit 0; fi; c=$(ls -1 "$d" 2>/dev/null | head -n 1 || true); if [ -z "${c:-}" ]; then echo "SKIP: no card worktrees"; exit 0; fi; echo "Using card: $c"; bash tower/scripts/tower_proofpack.sh --card "$c"'
